overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban industrial district with elevated highways, construction sites, and neon signage. The player navigates from a sunlit street into covered walkways beneath massive overpass structures and back into open areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with construction barriers and elevated highway approach

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to yellow construction barriers, approaching an intersection with an elevated highway overpass ahead

entered.detail: large concrete and steel highway structure spanning across the road ahead
yellow metal construction barriers lining the left side of the sidewalk
tall modern building with teal-tinted glass facade and multiple levels
multiple electrical cables stretching across the street above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban street with the camera walking forward along a concrete sidewalk. Yellow construction barriers line the left side while a massive elevated highway overpass looms ahead. The teal glass building stands prominently on the right, and overhead power lines crisscross the bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection under elevated highway with industrial steam vents

events.description: turns left at intersection entering area beneath the elevated highway structure
steam vents release white vapor plumes on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing forward under the shadow of the highway overpass, passing industrial steam vents

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the road under the overpass

entered.detail: industrial vents releasing white steam into the air near the sidewalk
building with glowing red neon signs displaying Japanese characters
massive support columns holding up the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the intersection, moving from bright sunlight into the shadow of the elevated highway. Industrial steam vents release white plumes on the left near a building with red neon signage. The environment becomes semi-covered as concrete support pillars dominate the right side while vehicles pass on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpass

events.description: enters narrow covered walkway under the highway structure with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered corridor beneath the highway, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the covered walkway wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: concrete underside of the highway forming a roof over the walkway
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
black metal security gate with pointed tops

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow enclosed walkway beneath the highway, the lighting drops significantly to low artificial levels. The concrete walls are covered in graffiti, and a metal gate appears on the left. The camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead through the corridor while the highway structure forms a solid ceiling overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor with industrial storage approaching exit

events.description: approaching exit of covered area, bright sunlight becoming visible at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway toward the visible exit, passing industrial storage containers on the left

entered.detail: industrial storage containers and barrels stacked along the left wall
palm trees visible in the distance near the exit

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the covered corridor where industrial storage containers line the left wall. The end of the tunnel approaches with bright sunlight visible ahead, and palm trees become visible in the distance. The lighting gradually transitions from dark to mixed as the exit nears.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street alongside curved elevated highway ramp

events.description: exits covered walkway back into direct sunlight and open sky
slight turn to follow the curved street alongside the highway ramp

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit street following the curve of the elevated highway ramp, passing palm trees and industrial buildings

entered.detail: massive curved concrete highway ramp sweeping overhead with green structural elements
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street in the open area

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens back into bright sunlight with a full view of the sky. A massive curved highway ramp dominates the left side, sweeping overhead with green structural panels. Palm trees line the street, and the camera follows the curve of the road past industrial buildings and warehouses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit urban street into the oppressive shadows of a subterranean industrial corridor. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk past yellow construction barriers and a teal glass building under a clear blue sky, moving toward a massive elevated highway overpass. As the camera turns left at an intersection, the scene shifts from brilliant sunlight into deep shadow, passing white plumes of steam from industrial vents and red neon signage. The environment then narrows and darkens further as the camera enters an enclosed walkway beneath the highway, where the open sky is replaced by a solid concrete ceiling and graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the perspective follows a pedestrian through this dim, artificial light toward a metal gate at the end of the corridor.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim industrial corridor into a bright, open urban landscape. It begins within a covered walkway lined with storage containers, moving steadily toward a distant glow of sunlight and the faint silhouette of palm trees. As the camera reaches the end of the tunnel, the lighting shifts from dark shadows to a brilliant glare, opening the view to a wide sky. The scene then expands to reveal a massive curved highway ramp with green structural panels sweeping overhead, while the camera follows the bend of the road past palm trees and industrial warehouses.
